title: Policy
description: A Policy defines who is permitted to perform an operation. Policies are checked before Rules — there's no point evaluating business conditions if the actor isn't authorized.

operation.description: The operation this policy applies to, expressed as Resource.Action.

description.description: A human-readable explanation of who is permitted to perform this operation.
examples: Only underwriters and admins may approve loan applications.
A post may only be deleted by its author or an admin.

allow.description: The actors permitted to perform this operation. An actor matching any entry is allowed.

role.description: A named role that is permitted to perform this operation.

ownership.description: When true, the actor must be the owner of the resource instance.

examples.description: Only underwriters and admins may approve loan applications.
A post may only be deleted by its author or an admin.
Only admins may terminate an employee.
